user.title: Connect to Switchboard
user.description: Enter your Switchboard host and the External API token (Switchboard → Settings → External API).

data_description.verify_ssl: Leave off for Switchboard's self-signed certificate unless you front it with a trusted certificate.
data_description.fingerprint: Optional. Pin the self-signed certificate by its SHA-256 fingerprint (shown on the Peers tab) — recommended over disabling verification.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Check the host, port, and that the External API is enabled.
error.bad_fingerprint: The TLS fingerprint is not valid hex.

abort.already_configured: This Switchboard instance is already configured.

run_action.name: Run action
run_action.description: Run any Switchboard rule action through /api/command.

action_type.name: Action type
action_type.description: The action to run, e.g. obs_scene_set, obs_delay_set, twitch_category_set, spotify_playback_start.

target.name: Target
target.description: Connection label or id (or a sentinel like "spotify"). Leave blank for actions with no target.

value.name: Value
value.description: The action value, e.g. a scene name or delay in seconds.

obs_scene_set.name: Set OBS scene
obs_scene_set.description: Switch the program scene of an OBS connection.

scene.name: Scene
scene.description: Name of the scene to switch to.

overlay_alert.name: Show overlay alert
overlay_alert.description: Show an alert on the Switchboard alerts overlay.
